overview: Wild turkeys are increasingly common in suburban parking lots and neighborhoods across North America, often blocking traffic or interacting with pedestrians. Facebook +1 While these birds may seem accustomed to humans, they are still wild animals that can become aggressive, territorial, and pose risks to cars by scratching them. KTVU +1 Authorities advise not running away from aggressive turkeys but instead maintaining dominance, making noise, or using items to block them. KCRA
